LanguageData.UB_SNS_MonsterActor.title: Monster actor
LanguageData.UB_SNS_MonsterActor.description: [PAWN_nameDef] worked for a major movie and film studio acting as the various monsters and animals in many shows and movies. Due to intergalactic restrictions on moving endangered and mythical animals across planetary lines, [PAWN_nameDef] was hired to wear realistic animal suits and took classes on how to act exactly how they would in their natural habitat. [PAWN_pronoun] quickly rose to the top in their company as #1 animal standee. When import law got more lax, [PAWN_nameDef] lost their postion, but continued working as a background actor.
